payload.question:
All changes applied:
- Playwright MCP: Added Playwright MCP service (mcr.microsoft.com/playwright/mcp, port 8931, headless chromium). Added as war-room dependency. Created config/mcp-settings.json. Updated launch.sh to merge MCP config on startup. Updated Dockerfile to copy config/.
- Bitbucket MCP: Replaced static MCP config with dynamic generation in launch.sh. Playwright always included, Bitbucket conditionally added when env vars present. Added BITBUCKET_USERNAME/PASSWORD/URL to docker-compose.yml and .env.example.
- Figma removal: 5 files updated

Review and approve to proceed with verification.
payload.title: Agent Tooling — Review Changes
